visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of five people is seated on and behind a light-colored sofa against a clean white wall. The primary female character, with long brown hair, wears a pink tweed jacket over a white collared shirt and light blue pants. To her right, a male character in a black high-collared shirt and glasses holds a paper and a grey foam tube. In the background, a man with blonde hair and two women look on. They all begin clapping enthusiastically with bright smiles and open facial expressions. (2) The camera switches to a medium shot focusing on the woman in the pink jacket. She claps her hands together and laughs with her eyes squinted, displaying high energy. Colorful variety text appears above her head. The background shows a minimalist white shelf with a blue decorative plate and other small items. (3) The male character in the black shirt turns toward the woman, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. He holds the grey foam roller prominently. On-screen text appears next to him as he emphasizes his points with facial expressions of concern and then nodding. (4) A close-up of the woman in the pink jacket speaking directly into the camera. She uses expansive hand gestures and maintains a confident, smiling expression. Bold variety text covers the middle of the frame as she delivers her message. (5) Back to a wider shot where the man in black reacts with exaggerated surprise, mouth wide open, and hands thrown out. The woman holds the grey foam tube horizontally across her lap. Multiple layers of promotional text about a career course appear sequentially on the screen. (6) The final scene shows the group laughing together after the woman delivers a punchline. A large, stylized variety text overlay dominates the center of the frame. The woman is seen leaning forward while laughing, and the others in the background are visibly amused, clapping again.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來啦 再次歡迎我們 Mina 老師啦. [Variety]: 職場救星. (2) [Subtitle]: 救救我 不管你是要去. [Variety]: 求職. [Variety]: 離職. (3) [Subtitle]: 還是像我們這個主管公司 招聘人才. [Variety]: 招聘人才. (4) [Subtitle]: 都需要你來幫我們 講評講評兩句. (5) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 想要賺錢的 聽我的就對了. [Variety]: 想要賺錢的聽我的就對了. (6) [Subtitle]: 老師跟大家介紹一下 我開了一個很完整的課程. (7) [Variety]: 5週職場翻盤. [Variety]: 擺脫爛人爛主管爛同事. [Variety]: 3萬到3000萬的終極攻略. (8) [Subtitle]: 所以我只要上了這個課 3000萬就回來了. [Variety]: 3000萬就回來了. [Variety]: 量身打造. (9) [Subtitle]: 那當大家提離職 要嘛就是什麼 什麼爛人爛事啊 遇到什麼王八蛋啊 這都很合理嘛. (10) [Subtitle]: 但對老闆 不能講出來吧 可能不方便講 但你就可以說 可能你的成長卡關了 你覺得認知卡關了 那你想要來這邊 挑戰更大的 更好的挑戰 或是挑戰更往上階的公司 這堂課會有點像是 統包了所有大家 職場需要的內容. (11) [Subtitle]: 那這是題外話 那如果像這種已經黑掉的員工 他要怎麼找到工作 老師有辦法嗎. (12) [Subtitle]: 我是覺得他可以投胎啦. [Variety]: 投胎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 main male host, 3 participants in the background on the sofa.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The woman is wearing a pink tweed jacket over a white shirt; the man is wearing a black shirt and glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, bright indoor space featuring a white sofa and a white decorative shelf unit with a circular blue plate.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice introducing a guest with rapid, energetic prosody. Rhythmic, medium-tempo electronic BGM with a bright synth beat is layered underneath. Sound of coordinated hands clapping creates a high-arousal studio atmosphere. (2) A sharp 'Ding' sound effect triggers a transition. A female voice bursts into a high-pitched, joyful laugh. The BGM remains constant in tempo. The acoustic environment is clean, with very high signal purity and minimal room floor. (3) The male speaker returns at a moderate conversational pace, using a friendly and professional tone. The BGM synth textures are clearly audible. A 'Whoosh' sound effect punctuates the transition between his phrases, maintaining a dynamic information flow. (4) The female speaker takes over with a confident, slightly rising intonation. Her speech is enunciated clearly. The BGM continues as a steady rhythmic bed. Occasional 'Ding' sound effects coincide with key promotional points, highlighting the sound design's emphasis. (5) The male voice reaches a peak arousal level, shouting in excitement to react to the guest's points. This is followed by a sudden increase in group laughter and the sound of hands clapping. A 'Pop' SFX is heard as more information is shared. (6) A longer narrative segment from the female voice, speaking with high pitch variability and a cheerful tone. The BGM provides a consistent harmonic foundation of electronic chords. Speech and music overlap continuously throughout the sequence. (7) A momentary dip in BGM volume occurs as the male speaker asks a question in a lower, more inquisitive pitch. This creates a brief focus on the dialogue before the final punchline. (8) The female speaker delivers a joke, leading to a massive explosion of group laughter and cheering. A final, loud resonant 'Ding' SFX marks the climax. The BGM reaches its cadence and cuts sharply to studio silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Introduction -> Solution Presentation -> Humorous Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a career-related training course by Mina. It uses a comedic talk-show format to discuss common workplace struggles and offers the course as a definitive guide for career advancement and financial success, ending with a humorous punchline to maintain engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of a course, its benefits, and its title as a 'ultimate strategy'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high visual energy and fast-paced editing style are characteristic of social media promotional content designed to capture attention quickly.
